Unidad 4 - En el Consultorio

Health, doctor visit vocabulary, and interpretive reading practice connected to Unit 4 themes.

Live Unit

Unidad 5 - La Tecnologia

Technology and car vocabulary, reading comprehension, and mixed grammar review.

Core Practice

Main La Tecnologia test sets covering vocabulary, grammar, and mixed review.

Integrated exam for Senderos 2 Lesson 5 practice.

Por vs. Para

Live Section

Por vs. Para Practice

Targeted review of usage patterns and distinctions between por and para in context.

Timed por vs. para set with 20 questions and a 17-minute limit.

Por vs. Para 2

Por vs. para set with vocabulary focus, 20 questions, and a 17-minute limit.

Update rule: when you add a new unit folder or standalone grammar section, add one new `unit-card` here and link each test file inside it.
